original_claim: Government has banned all UPI transactions and digital payments in India
debunk_summary: UPI continues to operate normally. RBI has not issued any such directive. This is a recurring hoax designed to cause panic.

original_claim: 5G towers cause COVID-19 and spread the virus through radiation
debunk_summary: COVID-19 is caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus, not by radio waves. 5G uses non-ionizing radiation that cannot carry viruses. WHO and ICNIRP have confirmed 5G is safe.

original_claim: COVID-19 vaccines contain microchips for government surveillance
debunk_summary: Vaccines contain mRNA or viral vector components, adjuvants, and stabilizers. No microchips exist small enough to fit through a vaccine needle. This conspiracy theory has been debunked by multiple independent labs.

original_claim: Drinking warm water with lemon cures COVID-19
debunk_summary: While staying hydrated is important, no home remedy including warm lemon water can cure COVID-19. Treatment requires proper medical intervention.

original_claim: India's election EVMs were hacked by foreign agencies to change results
debunk_summary: EVMs are standalone devices with no internet connectivity, WiFi, or Bluetooth. They cannot be remotely hacked. Multiple independent audits have verified EVM integrity.

original_claim: Free laptops are being distributed by the central government via WhatsApp link
debunk_summary: This is a phishing scam. The central government has no such scheme. Official government schemes are announced through press conferences and gazette notifications, not WhatsApp.

original_claim: Aadhaar database has been hacked and 100 crore Indians data leaked
debunk_summary: UIDAI has repeatedly denied any breach of the Aadhaar database. The system uses multi-layered security including encryption, and biometric data is stored in a secure vault.

original_claim: Cryptocurrency has been completely banned in India
debunk_summary: India has not banned cryptocurrency. The Finance Act 2022 introduced a 30% tax on crypto income and 1% TDS on transactions, but trading remains legal.

original_claim: सरकार ने सभी UPI लेनदेन और डिजिटल भुगतान पर प्रतिबंध लगा दिया है
debunk_summary: UPI सामान्य रूप से काम कर रही है। RBI ने ऐसा कोई निर्देश जारी नहीं किया है। यह एक बार-बार आने वाला धोखा है।

original_claim: 5G टावर COVID-19 फैलाते हैं और विकिरण से वायरस फैलता है
debunk_summary: COVID-19 SARS-CoV-2 वायरस से होता है, रेडियो तरंगों से नहीं। 5G गैर-आयनीकरण विकिरण का उपयोग करता है। WHO ने पुष्टि की है कि 5G सुरक्षित है।

original_claim: COVID-19 टीकों में सरकारी निगरानी के लिए माइक्रोचिप्स हैं
debunk_summary: टीकों में mRNA या वायरल वेक्टर घटक होते हैं। कोई माइक्रोचिप इतनी छोटी नहीं है कि टीके की सुई से गुजर सके।

original_claim: WhatsApp लिंक से केंद्र सरकार मुफ्त लैपटॉप बांट रही है
debunk_summary: यह एक फिशिंग घोटाला है। केंद्र सरकार की ऐसी कोई योजना नहीं है। सरकारी योजनाएं प्रेस कॉन्फ्रेंस और गजट अधिसूचनाओं के माध्यम से घोषित की जाती हैं।

original_claim: அரசு அனைத்து UPI பரிவர்த்தனைகளையும் டிஜிட்டல் கட்டணங்களையும் தடை செய்துள்ளது
debunk_summary: UPI இயல்பாக செயல்படுகிறது. RBI அத்தகைய உத்தரவை வெளியிடவில்லை. இது பீதியை ஏற்படுத்த வடிவமைக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு மீண்டும் மீண்டும் வரும் பொய்.

original_claim: 5G கோபுரங்கள் COVID-19 ஐ ஏற்படுத்துகின்றன
debunk_summary: COVID-19 SARS-CoV-2 வைரஸால் ஏற்படுகிறது, ரேடியோ அலைகளால் அல்ல. 5G அயனியாக்கம் செய்யாத கதிர்வீச்சைப் பயன்படுத்துகிறது. WHO 5G பாதுகாப்பானது என்று உறுதிப்படுத்தியுள்ளது.

original_claim: UNESCO has declared the Indian National Anthem 'Jana Gana Mana' as the best in the world.
debunk_summary: UNESCO has officially clarified that they have made no such statement or given any such award to any national anthem. This is a long-running hoax.

original_claim: The newly inaugurated Ram Mandir uses AI-controlled laser technology to ensure the sun always hits the idol's forehead at exact noon every single day.
debunk_summary: While Surya Tilak is an engineering feature using lenses and mirrors designed by the CBRI, it does not use AI or lasers, and specifically happens on Ram Navami, not every day.

original_claim: Climate change is a natural cycle, and global warming has actually stopped since 1998.
debunk_summary: Multiple scientific bodies, including NASA and the IPCC, verify that human activities are the primary driver of current climate change. The planet has continued to warm significantly since 1998.

original_claim: യുനെസ്കോ ഇന്ത്യൻ ദേശീയഗാനത്തെ ലോകത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ചതായി പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചു
debunk_summary: ഇതൊരു വ്യാജവാർത്തയാണ്. യുനെസ്കോ അത്തരമൊരു പ്രഖ്യാപനം നടത്തിയിട്ടില്ലെന്ന് അവർ തന്നെ വ്യക്തമാക്കിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

original_claim: AI deepfakes are completely indistinguishable from real videos and even experts cannot tell the difference.
debunk_summary: While deepfakes are advancing, forensic experts use detection algorithms analyzing lighting, audio-video sync, and biological signals (like blinking) to reliably detect AI generated or manipulated videos.

original_claim: ഇന്ത്യൻ കറൻസി നോട്ടുകളിൽ ഗാന്ധിജിയുടെ ചിത്രത്തിന് പകരം മറ്റ് നേതാക്കളുടെ ചിത്രം വരുന്നു
debunk_summary: റിസർവ് ബാങ്ക് ഓഫ് ഇന്ത്യ (ആർബിഐ) ഇത് നിഷേധിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. കറൻസി നോട്ടുകളിൽ മാറ്റം വരുത്താൻ യാതൊരു പദ്ധതിയും ഇപ്പോൾ ഇല്ല.

original_claim: RBI 500 रुपये के नोट पर से महात्मा गांधी की तस्वीर हटाकर रवींद्रनाथ टैगोर की तस्वीर लगाने जा रहा है
debunk_summary: RBI ने स्पष्ट किया है कि भारत के करंसी नोटों में मौजूदा महात्मा गांधी सीरीज़ में कोई बदलाव करने का कोई प्रस्ताव नहीं है।

original_claim: യുപിഐ (UPI) സേവനങ്ങൾക്ക് ഇനി മുതൽ ചാർജ് ഈടാക്കും
debunk_summary: സാധാരണ യുപിഐ ഇടപാടുകൾക്ക് യാതൊരു ചാർജും ഇല്ലെന്ന് കേന്ദ്ര ധനകാര്യ മന്ത്രാലയം വ്യക്തമാക്കിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

original_claim: The Indian government has passed a law to seize all private gold exceeding 500 grams per married woman.
debunk_summary: No such new law has been passed. The CBDT issued a clarification citing old rules that gold up to 500g for married women and 250g for unmarried women will not be seized during income tax raids, but this does not limit ownership.

original_claim: Himalayan salt lamps absorb negative energy and cure respiratory completely by emitting negative ions.
debunk_summary: Scientific studies show Himalayan salt lamps emit virtually no negative ions and have no proven medical benefit for respiratory diseases. Air purifiers with HEPA filters are required for real air quality improvement.

original_claim: The Reserve Bank of India has issued a new ₹1000 note with the signature of the new governor.
debunk_summary: The RBI has officially stated that no new ₹1000 denomination notes have been issued since their demonetization in 2016.

original_claim: Electric vehicles (EVs) are catching fire because 5G networks interfere with their battery management systems.
debunk_summary: EV fires are primarily caused by thermal runaway due to battery defects, poor thermal management, or physical damage. 5G signals operate on entirely different frequencies and cannot interfere with wired internal vehicle systems.

original_claim: இந்தியாவில் புதிய ₹1000 நோட்டுகள் வெளியிடப்பட்டுள்ளன
debunk_summary: இந்திய ரிசர்வ் வங்கி புதிய ₹1000 நோட்டுகளை வெளியிடவில்லை என்று மறுத்துள்ளது. இது சமூக வலைதளங்களில் பரவும் வதந்தி.

original_claim: आयुर्वेदिक काढ़ा पीने से कैंसर जैसी गंभीर बीमारियां 3 दिन में जड़ से खत्म हो जाती हैं
debunk_summary: कैंसर जैसी बीमारियों के लिए प्रॉपर मेडिकल ट्रीटमेंट और सर्जरी/कीमोथेरेपी की आवश्यकता होती है। कोई भी घरेलू काढ़ा 3 दिन में कैंसर खत्म नहीं कर सकता।

original_claim: ಕೇಂದ್ರ ಸರ್ಕಾರವು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಖಾಸಗಿ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್‌ಗಳನ್ನು ರಾಷ್ಟ್ರೀಕರಣ ಮಾಡಲು ನಿರ್ಧರಿಸಿದೆ.
debunk_summary: ಹಣಕಾಸು ಸಚಿವಾಲಯವು ಅಂತಹ ಯಾವುದೇ ಪ್ರಸ್ತಾಪವನ್ನು ನಿರಾಕರಿಸಿದೆ. ಬದಲಾಗಿ ಕೆಲವು ಸಾರ್ವಜನಿಕ ವಲಯದ ಬ್ಯಾಂಕ್‌ಗಳ ಖಾಸಗೀಕರಣದ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಚರ್ಚೆಗಳು ನಡೆಯುತ್ತಿವೆ.

original_claim: Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) has completely stopped in India since 2023.
debunk_summary: According to the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), India continues to receive billions of dollars in FDI annually, though global economic conditions have caused fluctuations.

original_claim: Eating alkaline ash cures Hypertension completely within 3 days without any medication.
debunk_summary: Medical experts clarify that while nutritious, no single food cures this disease instantly.

original_claim: New 5G towers are causing a sudden mass death of honeybees in the city.
debunk_summary: Scientific studies have repeatedly shown non-ionizing radiation from cellular towers does not harm local wildlife.

original_claim: The government has mandated that all smartphones must have a microchip implanted by July.
debunk_summary: There is no official mandate requiring microchips in these items. This is a recurring conspiracy theory.

debunk_summary: There is no official mandate requiring microchips in these items. This is a recurring conspiracy theory.
